name: Set up Gmail labels and filters across the three Shultz inboxes
description: Caleb task — create the agreed-upon label set (Revenue, Customer, Legal, Marketing, Newsletter, Personal) in each of buildingshultz@, irishcraftsman7@, jedidiahshultz3@ and wire filters that auto-apply them.
trigger_examples: set up gmail labels across all 3 inboxes
prompt_template: Caleb: in Chrome, log into each of the three Gmail accounts (buildingshultz, irishcraftsman7, jedidiahshultz3). Create labels: Revenue, Customer, Legal, Marketing, Newsletter, Personal. Create filters matching the spec in /root/solomon-v4/manus/gmail_filter_spec.md (or, if absent, use the default heuristics: 'invoice|payment' → Revenue; 'reply|inquiry|customer' → Customer; etc.). Return a summary per-account: labels created, filters created.
escalation_conditions: manus filter spec missing — escalate to Jed to confirm rules
Gmail asks for a re-login or 2FA — pause and tell Jed to authenticate
caleb_steps: For each of 3 accounts, switch profile

smoke_test.trigger_message: configure gmail filters across all three accounts

notes: From Cowork Task Queue item #1 in master context.
